title: Self-Hosted Auth with Lucia Auth + Turso
description: Add session-based authentication backed by a Turso (LibSQL) edge database — no Clerk, no Supabase, full control.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Turso (LibSQL) as the edge-compatible database with Drizzle ORM for user and session tables
Configure Lucia Auth v3 with the Drizzle adapter for session-based authentication
Deploy to Vercel with Turso database connection strings set as environment variables
